news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro Confirms Second Quarter 2026 Results Date of August 3
news.summary: ClearPoint Neuro will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, August 3, 2026, after market close, with a conference call and live webcast at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time.

news.headline: EpilepsyGTx Partners with ClearPoint Neuro to Support Targeted Delivery of Lead Gene Therapy in Epilepsy
news.summary: EpilepsyGTx will use ClearPoint's SmartFlow Cannula and Navigation System to deliver its gene therapy candidate EPY201 in an upcoming first-in-human Phase 1/2a trial for focal refractory epilepsy, expected to start in the UK/Europe by end of 2026.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro CEO Burnett Sells $387,600 in Company Shares
news.summary: CEO Joseph Burnett sold 20,000 shares at a weighted average price of $19.38 under a pre-established Rule 10b5-1 trading plan (adopted June 2025), following exercise of options at $2.50 per share.

news.headline: B. Riley Raises ClearPoint Neuro Price Target to $30.00 from $20.00, Keeps Buy Rating
news.summary: B. Riley Securities analyst Anderson Schock raised his price target on ClearPoint Neuro to $30 from $20 while maintaining a Buy rating, citing continued momentum from the uniQure/AMT-130 regulatory progress and the company's broadening biopharma partnership base.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro Stock Surges on Partner uniQure's Favorable FDA Path for Huntington's Gene Therapy
news.summary: CLPT shares jumped roughly 26-32% intraday (with some reports of gains as high as 50% pre-market) after partner uniQure said the FDA agreed that 3-year Phase I/II data for AMT-130, delivered via ClearPoint's navigation platform and SmartFlow cannula, can support a BLA for accelerated approval, with submission planned for Q3 2026.

news.headline: Stifel Reiterates ClearPoint Neuro Buy Rating and $16 Price Target on Neurosurgery Platform Strength
news.summary: Following the biennial American Society for Stereotactic and Functional Neurosurgery meeting, Stifel reiterated its Buy rating and $16 price target, highlighting ClearPoint's neuro ecosystem and more than 60 active biopharma partnerships, including over 10 programs with FDA expedited-review designations.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings release
catalysts.detail: ClearPoint Neuro confirmed via an ACCESS Newswire press release on July 21, 2026 that it will report second-quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, August 3, 2026, after market close, followed by a conference call/webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET; the market will watch progress against the $52-56M full-year revenue guidance.

catalysts.label: uniQure BLA submission for AMT-130 (Huntington's disease)
catalysts.detail: Partner uniQure plans to file a Biologics License Application with the FDA for AMT-130, delivered via ClearPoint's navigation platform and SmartFlow cannula, using 3-year Phase I/II data following supportive Type B FDA meeting feedback; uniQure continues finalizing confirmatory-trial design (including possible concurrent active-control arm) ahead of filing.

catalysts.label: EpilepsyGTx first-in-human trial start (EPY201)
catalysts.detail: EpilepsyGTx plans to begin a first-in-human Phase 1/2a trial of EPY201 for focal refractory epilepsy in the UK/Europe using ClearPoint's SmartFlow Cannula and Navigation System, enrolling up to 30 adults.

catalysts.label: IRRAS integration synergies / reduced cash burn
catalysts.detail: Company guidance calls for cost synergies from the IRRAS acquisition to begin reducing cash burn in H2 2026, supporting the path to the $52-56 million full-year revenue target.

catalysts.label: CE Mark decision for ClearPoint Prism Laser Therapy system
catalysts.detail: Partner Clinical Laserthermia Systems (CLS) filed a CE-marking application in Europe for the ClearPoint Prism Neuro Laser Therapy System (1.5T and 3.0T MRI guidance) in December 2025, following a supportive clinical study at Skane University Hospital; regulatory approval is expected in the second half of 2026, which would enable commercial launch in European hospitals.

pulse: ClearPoint Neuro's story remains anchored to its partners' pipelines: uniQure's supportive June 17 FDA feedback on AMT-130 (delivered via ClearPoint's platform) drove a sharp CLPT rally (roughly 26-32%, with pre-market prints as high as 50%) and points to a Q3 2026 BLA filing, prompting B. Riley to lift its price target to $30 on June 18 while Stifel separately reiterated its Buy/$16 target on June 9 after the ASSFN neurosurgery meeting. The mid-July EpilepsyGTx delivery partnership keeps widening the drug-delivery ecosystem, alongside routine CEO 10b5-1 share sales (most recently June 29) that do not appear to signal a change in outlook. Fundamentals continue to improve, with Q1 2026 revenue up 43% to $12.1 million and full-year guidance of $52-56 million reaffirmed as IRRAS integration progresses; ClearPoint confirmed on July 21 that it will report Q2 2026 results on August 3, 2026 after market close, which is now the next major checkpoint alongside further clarity on uniQure's BLA timeline and the H2 2026 CE Mark decision for the Prism laser system in Europe.
